description.value:
You're so drawn to the natural beauty and wonder of the cosmos that your skin and hair might sparkle with starlight. You might respect or revere Ibra, Desna, Sarenrae, and other deities of the stars, or you might have a profound fascination with various specific stars. Whether you live on the Burning Archipelago or on a star-orbiting solar station, you likely want to find your own patch of space to admire the stars without the hubbub of space traffic.

You become trained in Sun Lore and gain a +1 circumstance bonus to Piloting or Survival checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Navigate] or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Sense Direction] while you can see stars. Additionally, you can cast the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.Light] cantrip as a divine innate spell at will. A cantrip is heightened to a spell rank equal to half your level rounded up.
